backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that includes blob storage and authorization mixins, defines UserProfile and PurchaseOrder types, and exposes query/update functions for managing user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that all form modals (PurchaseOrderFormModal, SupplierFormModal, StaffFormModal, ShiftFormModal, Expenses) reset their fields to blank defaults on mount without deleting saved database records.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key behaviors, and notable changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Petrol Pump Management Software SPA, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, sales, inventory, staff, customers, billing, reports, suppliers, expenses, other, login, profile-setup) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/billing/InvoiceD: Modal dialog displaying full invoice details including line items, subtotal, tax, and total with ₹ formatting, plus buttons to print the invoice or toggle its paid/unpaid status.
frontend/src/components/customers/Redeem: Modal dialog that allows redeeming a specified number of loyalty points for a given customer, with validation against available balance and a redemption note field.
frontend/src/components/customers/Regist: A modal dialog for registering or editing a customer, with form fields for name, contact, and vehicle number, including validation and store integration via useAppStore.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Metric: A reusable dashboard card component that displays a metric with a title, value, optional unit, icon, trend badge, and subtitle, styled with color variants.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StockG: A visual fuel stock gauge card showing current level as a progress bar with a threshold marker, color-coded status (OK/Low/Critical), and capacity details.
frontend/src/components/inventory/StockA: A modal form for manually adding or subtracting fuel stock for a selected fuel type, with validation and store dispatch via adjustStock.
frontend/src/components/inventory/Thresh: A modal form that allows configuring low-stock alert thresholds (in liters) for each fuel type, updating the store via updateThreshold.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The main application layout component that composes the Sidebar, TopBar, and a router Outlet, managing sidebar open/close state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: A responsive navigation sidebar with links to all app sections, supporting mobile overlay behavior and active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/layout/TopBar.ts: The top header bar with a mobile menu toggle, app title, notification bell with low-stock badge count, and a user profile button.
frontend/src/components/sales/RecordSale: A modal dialog for recording a fuel sale, with fields for fuel type, quantity, payment method, pump number, and staff member, including validation and stock checks before submitting via the app store.
frontend/src/components/staff/ShiftFormM: A modal form for creating a new staff shift, collecting staff member, date, start/end times, pump number, and status, then dispatching to the app store on submit.
frontend/src/components/staff/StaffFormM: A modal form for adding or editing a staff member, supporting fields like name, role, contact, hire date, status, and salary, and dispatching add or update actions to the app store.
frontend/src/components/suppliers/Purcha: A modal form for creating a purchase order, collecting supplier, fuel type, invoice details, quantities, and dates, with derived litre price calculation before submitting to the app store.
frontend/src/components/suppliers/Suppli: A modal form for adding or editing a supplier, with fields for name, contact, email, address, and fuel types supplied via checkboxes, dispatching add or update actions to the app store.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook `useGetCallerUserProfile` that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Inter and Rajdhani fonts, and defines a dark navy/amber theme using CSS custom properties and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: Billing page that displays invoices with search/filter controls, summary cards for paid/unpaid/overdue totals, and an invoice detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single customer showing their profile, stats (loyalty points, purchase volume), purchase history, and a modal to redeem loyalty points.
frontend/src/pages/Customers.tsx: Customers list page with search, summary stats, add/edit/delete customer functionality via modals and a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying summary metric cards (revenue, expenses, profit, customers), low stock alerts, and a recent sales list using data from the app store.
frontend/src/pages/Expenses.tsx: Expenses management page with a filterable/searchable table of expenses, category breakdown summary cards, and a modal form for adding new expense records.
frontend/src/pages/FuelSales.tsx: Fuel sales page showing revenue, litres sold, and unique customer summary cards, with a filterable sales table and a modal for recording new fuel sale transactions.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory management page displaying fuel stock levels as gauges with low-stock alerts, and modals for adding stock quantities or updating fuel prices.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, then redirects to profile setup or the main dashboard based on whether a user profile exists.
frontend/src/pages/Other.tsx: Static informational page rendering cards for Settings, Notifications, Security, Help, and About sections with placeholder descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: A profile setup page that collects name, role, and contact from a logged-in user and saves it via the backend actor, then redirects to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: A reports dashboard page displaying daily fuel sales summaries, 30-day revenue trends, fuel type breakdowns, and expense vs. revenue comparisons using Recharts charts.
frontend/src/pages/StaffManagement.tsx: A staff management page that lists employees with search/filter, shows payroll stats, and supports adding, editing, and deleting staff along with shift schedule viewing via tabs.
frontend/src/pages/Suppliers.tsx: A suppliers page with tabbed views for a supplier directory and purchase orders, supporting add/edit/delete of suppliers and creation/status-update of purchase orders.
frontend/src/store/appStore.ts: Defines all shared TypeScript types (FuelSale, Staff, Supplier, Invoice, etc.) and creates a Zustand store with seed data and actions for managing the fuel station app's global state.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines all shared TypeScript types and interfaces for the application, including enums for fuel types, payment methods, and statuses, as well as data models for sales, inventory, staff, customers, billing, suppliers, and expenses.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Rajdhani), and an extended color palette using OKLCH variables for theming including navy, amber, fuel-type, sidebar, and chart colors.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state, version, existing features, and pending feature requests for the Petrol Pump Manager app, noting that all form modals should auto-clear fields on mount without affecting saved records.
